arts.ttl: Man City signs teenage Palmeiras defender Vitor Reis for $36 million
arts.sum: Manchester City signed a second defender in two days, this time 19-year-old Vitor Reis from Palmeiras for 35 million euros ($36 million) on Tuesday. The four-time defending Premier League champion has been unusually busy in the January transfer window following an alarming run of form leading up to Christmas.

arts.ttl: Everton Want to Sign £50m Chelsea Star for David Moyes
arts.sum: Everton have added Chelsea defender Ben Chilwell to their list of full-back options for January.

arts.ttl: David Gray delivers Hibs transfer address as new recruitment chief’s role comes into sharp focus
arts.sum: Easter Road club have still to make any January additions but Gray says they are in a strong position.

arts.ttl: Lille's Jonathan David is one of the best strikers in Europe and a free agent this summer - so why on earth is no one talking about him?!
arts.sum: This season alone, David has 24 goal contributions to his name from 30 games across all competitions, with his stellar performances helping Lille to punch above their weight in the Champions League and push for their first top-three finish in Ligue 1 since their historic title success in 2020-21. That is made all the more bizarre by the fact he is now in the final six months of his contract at the Stade Pierre-Mauroy, and will almost certainly be available on a free transfer in the summer window.

arts.ttl: David Ornstein Shares Update on Postecoglou's Tottenham Future
arts.sum: Tottenham are struggling this season under Ange Postecoglou, and David Ornstein has provided an update on his future.

arts.ttl: Jonathan David - on the move in 2025 but out to stop Liverpool
arts.sum: In Liverpool on Tuesday night, the contract situations of Mohamed Salah, Trent Alexander-Arnold and Virgil van Dijk will hang in the Anfield sky - but there will be one more high-profile soon-to-be-out-of-contract figure looking to impress.
